subject: Reset Your Password - Business Operations Suite
text: You requested a password reset. Please visit this link to reset your password: http://localhost:3000/auth/reset-password?token=2b968aa1241f370b01a0e5111f0574631aa9febf18dbcd6496da0961fbb9781a
html:
Password Reset Request

We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to set a new password:

Reset Password

If you did not request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email.
